fix: resolve export button UI issues, enhance quality report, and fix PDF rendering
prs.body: This PR addresses several functional and UI regressions in the assessment platform. It fixes the "raw SVG" display issue on export buttons, enhances the depth of the AI-generated Assessment Quality Report, and overhauls the PDF export utility to ensure all sections render correctly with full content.

prs.title: feat(milestone2): Agent 4 Reporter UI + PDF Export + Assessment Assistant Page
prs.body:
## Milestone 2 — Assessment Assistant Framework
### What this PR adds
This PR implements the Milestone 2 agentic workflow layer on top of the existing Milestone 1 analytics dashboard.
### Changes
- **[src/agents/analyzer.py](cci:7://file:///Users/vamshipendyala/AIML-semProject/agentic-assessment-design/src/agents/analyzer.py:0:0-0:0)** — Stub for Agent 1 (Analyzer)
- **[src/agents/retriever.py](cci:7://file:///Users/vamshipendyala/AIML-semProject/agentic-assessment-design/src/agents/retriever.py:0:0-0:0)** — Stub for Agent 2 (Retriever)
- **[src/agents/recommender.py](cci:7://file:///Users/vamshipendyala/AIML-semProject/agentic-assessment-design/src/agents/recommender.py:0:0-0:0)** — Stub for Agent 3 (Recommender)
- **[src/agents/reporter.py](cci:7://file:///Users/vamshipendyala/AIML-semProject/agentic-assessment-design/src/agents/reporter.py:0:0-0:0)** — Agent 4 (Reporter): Generates a 6-section structured assessment report from pipeline state
- **[src/agents/graph.py](cci:7://file:///Users/vamshipendyala/AIML-semProject/agentic-assessment-design/src/agents/graph.py:0:0-0:0)** — LangGraph orchestrator placeholder
- **[src/utils/pdf_export.py](cci:7://file:///Users/vamshipendyala/AIML-semProject/agentic-assessment-design/src/utils/pdf_export.py:0:0-0:0)** — Converts report to downloadable PDF using fpdf2
- **[requirements.txt](cci:7://file:///Users/vamshipendyala/AIML-semProject/agentic-assessment-design/requirements.txt:0:0-0:0)** — Added `fpdf2` and `langgraph`
- **[app.py](cci:7://file:///Users/vamshipendyala/AIML-semProject/agentic-assessment-design/app.py:0:0-0:0)** — New "👩‍🏫 Assessment Assistant" page with:
  - Simulated 4-step LangGraph progress bar (Analyze → Retrieve → Recommend → Report)
  - Full structured report rendered in expandable sections
  - ⬇️ Download PDF button
### Report Sections (Agent 4 Output)
1. Assessment Quality Summary
2. Question Difficulty Distribution
3. Identified Learning Gaps & Exam Issues
4. Recommended Assessment Improvements
5. Supporting Pedagogical References
6. Educational and Ethical Disclaimers
### Notes
- All agent outputs currently use **dummy data** — ready for teammates to plug in real logic
- UI is fully functional and demo-ready

fix(node): ensure process.argv is an array of strings
prs.body:
This PR resolves #30964  where process.argv returned getter functions rather than string values.
The fix removes the getter definitions and initializes argv[0] and argv[1] directly during __bootstrapNodeProcess  aligning with Node.js behavior 

I previously opened a PR  #31287 for this issue  and I worked on the feedback provided This version addresses the concerns raised (such as reverting whitespace changes) and includes the corrected implementation

prs.title: fix(node/process): Correct process.argv shape to match Node.js behavior
prs.body:
Description

This PR fixes the behavior of process.argv in Deno’s Node compatibility layer.
Previously, process.argv did not match Node.js shape.
This change updates it to correctly include:

The Deno executable path
The entry script
All following arguments

Related Issue

Closes 
#30964 

No breaking changes. Aligns Deno Node-compat with expected Node.js semantics.

prs.title: 🔔 Enhance reminder form UI: time before repeat, instant rendering, Wh…
prs.body:
Added support for 3 reminder types: alert, block, and custom.

For alert, user selects category or custom domain + sets time + optional repeat after first alert.

For block, user enters a domain and sets block time (no category needed).

For custom, user enters name, message, and total screen time trigger (no domain/category).

Time inputs now accept hours, minutes, and seconds.

Custom repeat interval supported (HH:MM:SS).

New reminders appear instantly on the page after creation.

Reminder cards redesigned with WhatsApp-style green theme.
#85

prs.title: feat: add GET endpoint for activity summary by category
prs.body:
#56 

Added new GET endpoint: /api/activity/summary/category

Groups user activity by category (e.g., Social Media, Work, etc.)

Uses categorizeDomain() utility for domain classification

Aggregates total duration, session count, and last visit per category

Supports startDate and endDate as optional query filters

Added controller logic in activity.controller.js

Registered route in activity.route.js with verifyToken middleware

prs.title: UI improvements: React Router fix, registration page, login theme imp…
prs.body:
Implemented UI improvements on the Login page:

Ensured input fields have consistent white background (better visibility in both light and dark themes).

Fixed layout to align with overall theme.

Designed and built the Registration page from scratch:

Added fields: Full Name, Email, Password, Confirm Password.

Included password strength validation and confirmation check.

Added redirect to dashboard on successful registration (placeholder).

Resolved React Router DOM integration issues:

Reworked routing logic to properly use BrowserRouter instead of Route or incorrect nesting.

Fixed navigation so Navbar links correctly route to Home, Login, and Registration pages without breaking the app.

Ensured dark mode / light mode toggle works across pages.

Improved code structure and readability for better maintainability.
#16 #30

prs.title: docs: add CONTRIBUTING.md file with contribution guidelines
prs.body:
This PR adds a CONTRIBUTING.md file to the project, outlining clear guidelines for new contributors.

✅ What's included:
- Project setup instructions (client and server)
- Coding conventions and folder structure
- Branch naming standards
- Commit message format (conventional commits)
- Pull request review process
- Issue creation guidelines

🎯 Purpose:
This helps onboard new contributors smoothly, ensures consistency across the codebase, and encourages more community participation.

Please review and suggest any improvements!

issues.title: Fix Real time data on Student DashBoard
Register + Login Endpoints
issues.body:
Implement user registration endpoint

Implement user login endpoint

Accept username and password for both endpoints

Hash passwords before storing in database

Validate user input (email, password, etc.)

Return error for invalid credentials

Generate and return JWT token on successful login

Add documentation for both endpoints

issues.title: Protected Routes + Role Redirection
issues.body:
Create ProtectedRoute component

Restrict access based on role

Redirect users after login:

Student → /student

Faculty → /faculty

Admin → /admin

Acceptance Criteria:

Protected routes verified

Users see only their allowed dashboard

issues.title: Auth Token Handling with Fetch + JWT Storage
issues.body:
Use the native fetch() API for all HTTP requests (no Axios).

Create a small helper function (e.g., apiFetch) to attach the JWT token automatically from localStorage for protected requests.

Store JWT in localStorage after successful login.

Implement a logout flow that clears the token and redirects to the login page.

issues.title: Fix Show Password Icon Styling and Alignment in Input Field
issues.body: The "Show Password" icon on the registration page is currently black and slightly misaligned inside the password input box. There's a noticeable gap between the end of the icon and the input’s right border, making it look inconsistent with the design. This issue requires adjusting the icon color to match the theme (e.g. gray) and fine-tuning its position so that it perfectly aligns with the input box edge without any extra spacing.
